description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the centos/python-35-centos7 Docker image and runs a before_script to install the Python packages pika, pymongo, zmq, pyyaml, fluidity-sm and python-dateutil via pip3. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that changes directory to /builds/clitellum/clitellum/clitellum/tests and executes python3 runner_tests.py. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
